entry.title: Change material type KMAT to HALB
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to change the material type KMAT to HALB. I've set for deletion and archived all purchase orders and also removed the stock from the material sending the stock for other material and/or scrapping the stock. But for some reason the batch number remains in the material. When I try to change the material type in MMAM t-code the message was shown:

The material type cannot be changed.

The reasons for this are:

There are independent valuation segments that are not permitted in the new material type. You must archive them first.

ValArea ValType
ZA010000822817
ZA010000822818
ZA010000822819
ZA010000822820
ZA010000822821
ZA010000822822
ZA010000822823
ZA010000822824
ZA010000833242

After that I've set deletion flag for all batches (valuation types) in MSC2N t-code and tried to archived them in SARA t-code, the following messages was shown:

MCH1: Material  0000822817 dependent batch records exist

MCHB: Material ZA01 ZA01 0000822817 unrestricted-use stock exists for previous period.

Can anyone suggest how to proceed?

Regards,

Christian Lima

entry.title: my fb50 did not appear posting period and and document type, kindly guide
entry.content: Im having hard time to do adjustment in FB50 because layout in my FB50 did not appear posting period and Document type display

entry.title: FULL list of Payment terms for Customer
entry.content: Hi, I would like to know what is transaction code for to view the full list of payment terms for our customer?

entry.title: Is it possible to post document with Secondary Cost Element by apps Post General Journal Entries
entry.content:
--- Product/Function ---
No predicted product
User selected product: SAP S/4HANA Cloud (Recent)
No predicted product function
User selected product function: SAP S/4HANA Cloud > Finance > Accounting and Financial Close > General Ledger Accounting > Reporting and Analysis (Recommended)
Predicted component: FI-FIO-GL (Product Function)

--- TagID/AreaID ---
TagID: #3
AreaID: 00109B36D6221EDBB0C0294B431680E8

--- Steps to Reproduce ---

*Note To SAP:
I give approval for SAP Support to use these Steps to Reproduce, while connected to my impacted non-production environments, even if the steps result in a change being made and my approval remains valid until the issue is resolved, unless I inform SAP Support otherwise.

--- Description ---

Hi,dear teams

I'm facing a issue that it is possible to post document with Secondary Cost Element by apps Post General Journal Entries?
As we all know,the secondary cost element can't be posted directly in general.
Please kindly check the attachment.

But once on my previous On-Premise project,I remember that it can be acheieved by configurating some points.
So I wonder it is also possible to do the same on S4HC?

Thank you very much.

entry.title: Regarding restrictions when referring to document type "SC"
entry.content:
I would like to use the general journal posting app to record BS accounts in different profit centers for each item.
To do this, we would like to use the document type "SC" instead of the document type "SA" to create documents for normal posting documents as well, since we will be splitting the documents.

If the above measures are taken, could you please let me know if there are any apps that will no longer be usable or if there are any restrictions?

entry.title: Email F150 Dunning letters after reviewing
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

May I know if there is a way to email the dunning letters after reviewing them? 

We have a requirement to view the dunning letters before emailing to exclude some from the mailing list because some customers may have settled their accounts and are not updated. In such cases, their dunning letters shouldn't be emailed.

entry.title: How can I increase document number input in open item selection in FB05 from 10 to 20 rows
entry.content: What is the process to increase number of rows. I have only 10 rows. Want to increase same to atleast 20. Have seen few screenshots online where certain users have 27 to 28 rows in FB05

entry.title: FSCM credit management: automatic release of deliveries with prepayments
entry.content:
Dear experts,
 
we have FSCM in place and use credit management. Our release is  S/4 2020/21 SPS 3. 
I have questions regarding the following process:
a customer has no credit limit and pays always in advance. The prepayment amount covers the order/ delivery amount, so that the credit limit check is generally positive. But the concerned deliveries always land up in SCASE and need to get unblocked manually. Is this the standard process? (I understand, if yes, because it's better to control it every time instead of trusting the customer. I just want the confirmation, as I haven't found any possibility to change the process 😊)
We would prefer, that such deliveries will not get blocked, when the prepayment is available and the amount equal or higher than the delivery. 
The same logic can be applied, when the customer balance is sufficient - I mean, when customer has overpayments or credit notes (debit > credit). Does SAP standard provide any possibility to set it up - by customizing, by BAdI, by user exit or else? 
 
Thanks a lot and best regards, Carina

entry.title: FSCM credit management: credit check step 140
entry.content:
Dear all, 
 
we have FSCM in place and use credit management. Our release is  S/4 2020/21 SPS 3. 
I found the new check step "140 check credit limit validity" in OSS note 2926009 and I would like to know:
  • what exactly does this step do? Could anyone explain with an example? 
  • would is be possible to implement this step also to our release 20/21 SPS3, although it's mentioned, that it's available in a later release? 
Many thanks in advance and best regards, Carina

entry.title: Any standard program to update AFBN without editing standard Tables
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Is there any standard SAP program we've to perform AFBN without editing standard table in debug mode?

Currently we're performing this activity in debug mode after updating custom table -
Table - T093A - will be updated for CoD -->90--> from 00 to 30 (WRTAFB) --> AFBN to activate area 90,91 and 92 --> Go back to T093A and update from 30 (old) to 00

Table - T093B - will be updated for companies, ABGJA  for dep area 90,91 and 92

Note - These are the new depreciation area we've created as a part of Turkey Inflation Asset Accounting.

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatic payment program not picking up a vendor
entry.content: We are facing issues with the payment run. There is one vendor for which payment specification is not sent. The last time it worked was on 14.03.2024 and suddenly it stopped working now. Can anybody help me with the correct tcodes and steps to check this issue.

entry.title: Merging Customer & Vendor into single BP
entry.content:
Hello,

During CVI pre-conversion activity on ECC/ERP system, If we want to merge customers and vendors into single BP which are having same legal entity (address) then in customization path do we need to assign customer & vendor account group to the same BP Grouping? Not all customers & vendors from those account groups are eligible to merge into single BP.

Thank you

entry.title: Add a new program in FF_5
entry.content:
Dear members,


Do you know how can I add in transaction FF_5 a new line with a new program?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Business area
entry.content:
Hi @AK6 

It would have helped if you had shared the business scenario where you would want to change the business area and also the system version as well as additional details  (Document splitting with Business Area as one of the criterion). Also do you have special ledger as well in your system for reporting purposes.

Let us take a simple example of material document, a change in business area could be effected as answered earlier:

Changing Business Area in a Material Document - SAP Community

You have to be mindful of the financial statements, since many customers use business area to comply with IFRS 8 - Segmental Reporting and a change just implemented through configuration change can throw your financial reports for a toss. It would be helpful if you share bit more details for the change and why you want do such a change, when the change is being implemented (Eg, fiscal year end etc).

Thanks & regards

Sanil Bhandari

entry.title: UDM_SPECIALIST Mass invoice reason code upload
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I am using UDM_SPECIALIST and whenever I get invoice level update from customer, i update the reason code to the selected transaction/ invoice. For example, if customer stated that an invoice is pending due to PO issues, I have to update the reason code as " Po Related " so that our management can see how much uncollected amounts are under perticular issue. In order to upload the reason code, I have to open each account and select the transaction but My question is, is there a way to mass upload the reason code in udm_specialist ?

entry.title: Change fiscal year variant / Fiscal periods for live company codes.
entry.content:
Our client wants to change the fiscal year of live company codes from Non- Calendar year [October - September] to Calendar year [January-December]

We have referred some SAP notes on this, but they are offering SAP DMLT service to meet the requirement.

Anybody know any other / alternative solution to complete the requirement?

Kindly share.

Note: We are on SAP ECC system.

Thank you.

Best Regards,

Sumant

entry.title: The cost is booked by using KB15N with Qty and setteled but Qty is not showing
entry.content:
HI all.

the cost is booked in an internal order through cost element using tcode KB15N with quantity. Cost element is active with qty tick. when we booked the cost the quantity is showing correctly but when we settele the internal order and transffered the cost using tcode ko88, the cost is shifted but quantity is not showing. the quantity is KWH and we are trying to transffered electricty.

but other cost elements are working ok. like diesel , petrol etc.

 

BR

Qaiser

entry.title: One legal entity with multiple company code or One company code with multiple plant-Changes to setup
entry.content:
Hi Experts

Would like to pick up on expert opinion. 

Background - Client is already on SAP with following setup with One legal entity having two physical plant (Operations and Sales). These are created under 2 separate co.codes due to showing of profitability of operations plant with Intracompany (IC) Revenue rather than just COGS. Transfer Price in PCA is currently not active and client has IC sales process with IC price condition type. 

Now they are extending to other country and want to use same setup of 2 co.codes (one for Operations &  other for Sales) to show separate profitability for both plants. 

Since activating TP in PCA will be a challenge right now in live system with all other company code process to be changed, our suggestion is to have a separate PC & CC group to differentiate cost and operations plant should not show sales revenue as when doing outside reporting, both company codes will be merged as one legal entity and the overall COGS & Sales will be accordingly. 

The other problem is for Cost absorption and Other cost which are not in standard.

Can you please share your opinion on:

what the client might miss out if they continue with 2 co.code approach?

what are pros/cons of both scenarios?

Is TP in PCA activation is the best and only way to show profitability and defining GL for internal goods movement and internal revenue as STO will not create GL entry?

Thanks in advance

A

entry.title: CK40N CK24 CK11N COSTING RUN
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am new to product costing and looking for some help to understand the tcode CK40N, CK24 and CK11N.

1) Does periodic costing run CK40N need to be performed during downtime? During the costing run, if a transaction is posted what will be the material cost?

2) Can costing run be done weekly, what are the complications?

Thanks in advance!

entry.title: Asset transfer ABUMN - partial transfer of wrongly added acquisition value
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts

I have a question regarding the partial transfer of an asset using ABUMN.

In 2019 an asset was created (laptop).  Use life : 3 years.

In 2023 (asset is already fully depreciated – NBV = zero), a new asset was created for the replacement of this old asset.  But when posting the invoice, the old asset was used instead of the new one.  So the acquisition value on the old asset increased with the value of the new asset.  But because the initial asset was already fully depreciated, the new value did not depreciate.

Now I want to transfer the new value to the new created asset.  How can I do this (partial) transfer ?  I only want to transfer the new value to the new asset and keep the original value on the old asset.

When I try to do the partial transfer, using the new value, also a part of the accumulated deprecation will be transferred and that is not the purpose.  I only want to transfer the new acquisition value, which has not been depreciated yet.  Original acquisition value and accumulated depreciation (same amount because fully depreciated) should remain on the old asset.

Thank you for your input !  Much appreciated !
